description.content: Returns all applications registered with the Spring Boot Admin server, grouped by application name. Each application may have multiple instances.

response.name: List of registered applications

description.content: Registers a new Spring Boot application with the Admin server. Typically called automatically by the spring-boot-admin-client dependency on startup.
Returns all instances for a specific application grouped by name.
Deregisters all instances of the specified application from the Admin server.
Returns all registered application instances. Each instance represents a running Spring Boot application registered with the Admin server.
Returns details for a specific application instance by its ID.

variable.description: (Required) Instance ID (assigned by Admin server on registration)
(Required) Instance ID (assigned by Admin server on registration)
(Required) Instance ID (assigned by Admin server on registration)

description.content: Deregisters a specific application instance from the Admin server.
Returns the list of Actuator endpoints available for a specific instance, as discovered from the instance's /actuator endpoint.
Proxies the health Actuator endpoint for the specified instance.
Proxies the info Actuator endpoint for the specified instance.
Proxies the metrics Actuator endpoint for the specified instance.
Proxies the env Actuator endpoint for the specified instance.
Proxies the loggers Actuator endpoint for the specified instance.
Proxies a POST to the loggers Actuator endpoint to change a logger level at runtime on the specified instance.
Server-Sent Events (SSE) stream of all instance lifecycle events. Events include REGISTERED, DEREGISTERED, STATUS_CHANGED, INFO_CHANGED, and ENDPOINTS_DETECTED.

response.name: SSE event stream of instance lifecycle events

description.content:
REST API for the Spring Boot Admin server. Manages application registration, instance monitoring, Actuator endpoint proxying, and lifecycle event streaming. Spring Boot Admin is a community project by codecentric AG that provides a web UI for monitoring and managing Spring Boot applications via their Actuator endpoints.

Contact Support:
 Name: codecentric AG
